description_long: This is a modern, upholstered chaise with a rounded back and sides, finished in a light beige or cream fabric. The backrest and armrests are integrated into a continuous, gently curved form, giving the piece a soft and inviting appearance. The seat features subtle vertical channel tufting, adding texture and visual interest to the otherwise smooth upholstery. Three loose cushions, two in a matching neutral tone and one in a contrasting yellow-green, are arranged along the backrest for added comfort and style. The chaise sits on small, barely visible legs, which slightly elevate it off the ground. The overall design is contemporary and plush, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A contemporary, rounded chaise in light beige upholstery with vertical channel tufting and three loose cushions, including a yellow-green accent. The design is plush and inviting, with integrated armrests and a smooth, continuous back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's curved back and armrest, with two cushions visible, one in yellow-green and one in beige.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full seat, all three cushions, and the vertical channel tufting on the seat surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the chaise's rounded profile and the arrangement of the cushions from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, continuous backrest and the tops of the three cushions peeking over the edge.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium height, smoothly curved, and continuous with the armrests, featuring a seamless, upholstered surface without visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the continuous curved form of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, cylindrical, and minimally visible, likely made of dark-finished wood or metal, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid in color with vertical channel tufting on the seat, giving it a subtle, quilted texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three loose cushions placed along the backrest: two in a matching beige tone and one in a contrasting yellow-green, arranged in a slightly overlapping, casual configuration.
